zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Catherine Rich於1429年出生在英國米德萊可倫敦時，她的父親Richard Rich II, Sheriff of London30歲，母親Catherine Cutherey22歲。她於1460年與Sir William Marrow IV, Lord Mayor of London在英國英格蘭倫敦結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1485年在她的家鄉享年56歲，埋葬在英國米德萊可倫敦。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Catherine Rich于1429年出生在英国米德萊可倫敦时，她的父亲Richard Rich II, Sheriff of London30岁，母亲Catherine Cutherey22岁。她于1460年与Sir William Marrow IV, Lord Mayor of London在英国英格兰倫敦结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1485年在她的家乡享年56岁，埋葬在英国米德萊可倫敦。

nameMeanings.name: Rich
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: nickname for a wealthy man (or perhaps in some cases an ironic nickname for a pauper), from Middle English, Old French riche ‘rich, wealthy’, a word of ancient Germanic origin, akin to ancient Germanic rīc ‘power(ful)’.
English: from the Middle English personal name Rich, a pet form of any of the post-Conquest names beginning in Rich-, such as Richer and especially Richard . Compare Rick .

English: either a topographic name from Middle English riche(Old English ric) ‘stream’, signifying one who lived beside a stream, as at Glynde Reach (Sussex), or perhaps a habitational name from the (now lost) village of Riche (Lincolnshire).

variants.name: Ritchie
meanings: Scottish: from a Scottish and northern English pet form of the personal name   Rich  , a short form of   Richard  . This surname is also common in Ulster.
Altered form of German   Richer   1.

variants.name: Ritch
meanings: English and Scottish (Orkney): either a variant of Rich , or perhaps from a short form of Ritchie , itself a diminutive based on Rich.

Altered form of German Ritsch, probably from a short form of an ancient Germanic personal name based on rīc ‘power(ful)’ or hrōd ‘fame, renown’; or an altered form of Swiss German Rütsch, Ruetsch, from Alemannic short forms of Rudolf .

variants.name: Riches
meanings: English (Norfolk and Suffolk): variant of Rich , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Richer
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Normand, Armand, Fernand, Herve, Laurent, Marcel, Aurele, Donat, Elphege, Emile, Flore, Gilles.

English (East Anglia), French, and German: from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements rīc ‘power(ful)’ + hari, heri ‘army’. The name was introduced into England by the Normans in the form Rich(i)er, Ricier, but was largely absorbed by the much more common Richard .

Altered form of French Héricher: from the ancient Germanic personal name Harigari, composed of the elements hari ‘army’ and gari (from garwa) ‘ready, eager’ or gari ‘spear’, or a variant of Hérissé, a nickname for someone with spiky hair, from the adjective hérissé, a derivative of the verb se hérisser ‘to stand on end’.

variants.name: Riche
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Pierre, Ghislaine, Philippe, Yanick, Yvon.
English (London): variant of   Rich  .
French: nickname for a rich man or perhaps an ironical name for a pauper, from Old French riche ‘rich’. Compare Leriche .

variants.name: Richins
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Ricun, a diminutive of Rich , itself a pet form of Richard , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s. It appears that a dialectally different (Norman or Picard) form of the French name, with medial /-k-/, also survived in England for a time alongside forms with original /-tʃ-/.

nameMeanings.name: Catherine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of   Katherine .  This form of the name is also used in France.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Catherine Rich was born in 1429, in London, Middlesex, England, her father, Richard Rich II, Sheriff of London, was 30 and her mother, Catherine Cutherey, was 22. She married Sir William Marrow IV, Lord Mayor of London in 1460, in London, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1485, in her hometown, at the age of 56, and was buried in London, Middlesex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Catherine Rich est née en 1429, à Londres, Middlesex, Angleterre, son père, Richard Rich II, Sheriff of London, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Catherine Cutherey, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Sir William Marrow IV, Lord Mayor of London en 1460, à Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1485, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 56 ans, et a été enterrée à Londres, Middlesex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Catherine Rich 1429 in London, Middlesex, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Richard Rich II, Sheriff of London 30 und ihre Mutter Catherine Cutherey 22. Sie hat 1460 in London, England, United Kingdom Sir William Marrow IV, Lord Mayor of London geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1485 im Alter von 56 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in London, Middlesex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Catherine Rich è nata il nel 1429 nel London, Middlesex, England, sua padre, Richard Rich II, Sheriff of London, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Catherine Cutherey, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato Sir William Marrow IV, Lord Mayor of London nel 1460, nel London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1485, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 56 anni, e fu sepolta a London, Middlesex, England.

ja.London, Middlesex, England: イギリスミッドレセックスロンドン
ja.London: イギリスイギリスロンドン
ja.London, England: イギリスイギリスロンドン
ja.lifeSummary: Lady Catherine Richが1429年にイギリスミッドレセックスロンドンで生まれた時，父Richard Rich II, Sheriff of Londonは30歳，母Catherine Cuthereyは22歳であった。1460年にイギリスイギリスロンドンでSir William Marrow IV, Lord Mayor of Londonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1485年に故郷で56歳で死去し，イギリスミッドレセックスロンドンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Catherine Rich(이)가 1429년 영국 미들레세스 런던에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard Rich II, Sheriff of London(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Catherine Cutherey(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1460년 영국 잉글랜드 런던에서 Sir William Marrow IV, Lord Mayor of London(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1485년 그녀의 고향에서 56세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 미들레세스 런던에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Catherine Rich nasceu em 1429, em London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard Rich II, Sheriff of London, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Catherine Cutherey, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir William Marrow IV, Lord Mayor of London em 1460, em London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1485, em sua cidade natal, com 56 anos, e foi sepultada em London, Middlesex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Catherine Rich родилась в 1429 г. в местности Лондон, миддлесекс, Англия, её отцу по имени Richard Rich II, Sheriff of London было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Catherine Cutherey, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir William Marrow IV, Lord Mayor of London в 1460 г. в местности Лондон, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1485 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 56 лет и была похоронена в местности Лондон, миддлесекс, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Catherine Rich nació en 1429, en London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard Rich II, Sheriff of London, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Catherine Cutherey, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Sir William Marrow IV, Lord Mayor of London en 1460, en London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1485, en su pueblo, a la edad de 56 años, y fue sepultada en London, Middlesex, Inglaterra.
